title: Crispy Tofu Onigiri
description: A fusion dish combining the crispy exterior of Norwegian-style pan-fried tofu with the traditional Japanese onigiri.
instructions: Cut the tofu into small cubes and set aside.
Heat the crispy Norwegian flakes in a pan over medium heat.
Add the tofu to the pan and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat a small amount of water over medium heat.
Add the cooked onigiri rice to the pan and stir-fry until heated through.
Add the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar to the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
Shape the onigiri rice into small triangular shapes.
Serve the crispy tofu on top of the onigiri rice.
